allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('context loaded:', bool\(d.get\('actionContext'\) or d\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ctx=d.get\('context',''\); print\(f'Context injected: {len\(ctx\)} chars'\); print\('First 120 chars:', ctx[:120]\)")
